stories.summary: Default generation produces correct length passwords with mixed charset
Individual charset flags correctly isolate character sets
--no-ambiguous correctly removes 0, O, 1, l, I from output
Invalid inputs produce proper error messages and exit code 1; extreme lengths work
--copy copies last password to clipboard; --count generates correct number of unique passwords
Default generates 16-char password with all character sets
stories.evidence:
```
$ python3 passgen.py
=BYL#_YM`7?2_6$T
(16 chars, mixed case + digits + symbols)
```

stories.summary: --length flag correctly controls password length (1-32 tested)
stories.evidence:
```
$ python3 passgen.py --length 32
TQ,(#aI'dJnrqE=ugKAw|mg7zDA^$}GI
(32 chars confirmed)

$ python3 passgen.py --length 1
Q
(1 char confirmed)
```

stories.summary: All four --no-* flags correctly exclude their character sets
stories.evidence:
```
$ python3 verify_charsets.py
no-uppercase: PASS (200-char password, zero uppercase found)
no-lowercase: PASS (200-char password, zero lowercase found)
no-digits: PASS (200-char password, zero digits found)
no-symbols: PASS (200-char password, zero symbols found)
```

```
$ python3 passgen.py --no-ambiguous --length 500 | grep -c '[0O1lI]'
0
(500-char password contains zero ambiguous characters)
```

```
$ python3 passgen.py --count 5
:s&WOgous>]IjgF[
ZjhpN}MV^B<C!O/n
V/9%}#|#is8[>$hT
:0Oj`isd*E{(&s5[
7Z5*w3w,]a}vNe}a
(5 lines, each 16 chars)
```

stories.summary: --copy puts first password on clipboard via pbcopy
stories.evidence:
```
$ OUTPUT=$(python3 passgen.py --copy --length 12)
$ echo "$OUTPUT" → $1H~SL#)6!5^
$ pbpaste → $1H~SL#)6!5^
COPY_MATCH: YES

$ OUTPUT=$(python3 passgen.py --copy --count 3 --length 10)
first line: k-*o7N-wOo
clipboard:  k-*o7N-wOo
FIRST_COPIED: YES (copies first password only)
```

stories.summary: Invalid length/count rejected with clean errors; all-disabled raises ValueError (exit 1)
stories.evidence:
```
$ python3 passgen.py --length 0
passgen.py: error: Length must be at least 1 (exit 2)

$ python3 passgen.py --length -1
passgen.py: error: Length must be at least 1 (exit 2)

$ python3 passgen.py --count 0
passgen.py: error: Count must be at least 1 (exit 2)

$ python3 passgen.py --no-uppercase --no-lowercase --no-digits --no-symbols
ValueError: At least one character set must be enabled (exit 1, traceback shown)
```

stories.summary: Multiple exclusion flags work correctly together
stories.evidence:
```
$ python3 passgen.py --no-uppercase --no-symbols --no-ambiguous --length 200
Combined flags: PASS (sample: i5iyficbxfca9dis6zgvvzvxv8r79p...)
(no uppercase, no symbols, no ambiguous chars confirmed)
```

stories.summary: All 32 unit and integration tests pass
